// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class WithErrorBindingsImpl extends WithErrorBindings:
    import WithErrorBindingsImpl.*

    def failable(x: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Outcome[Int] =
        val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.WithErrorBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
        val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
        try
            val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(captureLayout.byteSize(), captureLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.WithErrorBindings", "failable")
            val retVal: Int = failableMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, x)
            val __errno = errnoSeg.get(JAVA_INT, errnoOffset)
            val __kyoResult = retVal
            Ffi.Outcome.fromValueErrno(__kyoResult.toLong, __errno)
        finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
end WithErrorBindingsImpl

object WithErrorBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.WithErrorBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_we")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")
    private val captureLayout = Linker.Option.captureStateLayout()
    private val errnoOffset = captureLayout.byteOffset(java.lang.foreign.MemoryLayout.PathElement.groupElement("errno"))

    private val failableMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("failable").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(JAVA_INT, JAVA_INT),
        capture
    )
end WithErrorBindingsImpl
